$schema_note: 12-probe pre-deploy suite for W-18. Source of truth for question text + PASS/FAIL criteria: test_external_claude_2026-05-22_error_taxonomy_probe_suite.md (Obsidian vault, project-side ‚ÄĒ not checked into wordcracker-code). One probe per error class E1..E12. `id` (P1..P12) is the stable key used for baseline diffing; `error_class` and `question` follow the source taxonomy.

universal_pass_when.reason: plan-spec variable leaked to rendered text (R9)
no probe is allowed to overrun the per-request budget

probes.title: Entity resolution ‚ÄĒ Wells books via RU surname
probes.question: –ļ–į–ļ–ł–Ķ –ļ–Ĺ–ł–≥–ł —É –£—ć–Ľ–Ľ—Ā–į

pass_when.pattern: (?i)(time machine|war of the worlds|invisible man|island of doctor moreau|–ľ–į—ą–ł–Ĺ–į –≤—Ä–Ķ–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł|–≤–ĺ–Ļ–Ĺ–į –ľ–ł—Ä–ĺ–≤|–Ĺ–Ķ–≤–ł–ī–ł–ľ|–ĺ—Ā—ā—Ä–ĺ–≤ –ī–ĺ–ļ—ā–ĺ—Ä–į)
pass_when.reason: answer must mention at least one canonical Wells title

probes.notes: Source PASS: list of Wells books; RU-declension ¬ę–£—ć–Ľ–Ľ—Ā–į¬Ľ resolves. FAIL: parse-fail / clarify ¬ę—É—ā–ĺ—á–Ĺ–ł –į–≤—ā–ĺ—Ä–į¬Ľ.

probes.title: Filter enforcement ‚ÄĒ Dickens motion verbs (POS+semantics)
probes.question: –≥–Ľ–į–≥–ĺ–Ľ—č –ī–≤–ł–∂–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—Ź —É –Ē–ł–ļ–ļ–Ķ–Ĺ—Ā–į

pass_when.reason: answer must contain at least one real motion verb

probes.notes: Source PASS: real motion verbs walk/run/ride/hasten‚Ä¶ FAIL: general high-frequency verbs (come/see/made) under heading ¬ę–ī–≤–ł–∂–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—Ź¬Ľ.

probes.title: Renderer fabrication ‚ÄĒ Marlowe book count
probes.question: —Ā–ļ–ĺ–Ľ—Ć–ļ–ĺ –ļ–Ĺ–ł–≥ –Ĺ–į–Ņ–ł—Ā–į–Ľ Christopher Marlowe

pass_when.reason: Marlowe answer must not cite any 20th/21st century year ‚ÄĒ he died 1593

probes.notes: Source PASS: —á–ł—Ā–Ľ–ĺ —Ā–ĺ–≤–Ņ–į–ī–į–Ķ—ā —Ā tool data; –Ĺ–Ķ—ā –≤—č–ī—É–ľ–į–Ĺ–Ĺ—č—Ö –ī–į—ā/id; critic 0 flags. FAIL: –≤—č–ī—É–ľ–į–Ĺ–Ĺ—č–Ļ –≥–ĺ–ī —Ā–ľ–Ķ—Ä—ā–ł –ł–Ľ–ł PG-id.

probes.title: Blocklist leakage ‚ÄĒ Conan Doyle signature words (no toponyms)
probes.question: —Ą–ł—Ä–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–Ĺ—č–Ķ —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–≤–į –ö–ĺ–Ĺ–į–Ĺ –Ē–ĺ–Ļ–Ľ–į

pass_when.reason: Boer-war toponyms must not leak into signature-word list

probes.title: Multi-step fan-out ‚ÄĒ fear words for Poe AND Lovecraft
probes.question: —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–≤–į —Ā—ā—Ä–į—Ö–į —É –ü–ĺ –ł –õ–į–≤–ļ—Ä–į—Ą—ā–į –ĺ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ–≤—Ä–Ķ–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ

pass_when.reason: Poe must appear in the answer
Lovecraft must appear in the answer

probes.notes: Source PASS: –Ņ–į—Ä–į–Ľ–Ľ–Ķ–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č–Ļ fan-out, –ĺ–Ī–į –į–≤—ā–ĺ—Ä–į, per-author —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–≤–į —Ā—ā—Ä–į—Ö–į. FAIL: —ā–ĺ–Ľ—Ć–ļ–ĺ –ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ –į–≤—ā–ĺ—Ä, 1 call, –ľ—É—Ā–ĺ—Ä–Ĺ—č–Ķ —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–≤–į.

probes.title: Over-eager clarify ‚ÄĒ Victorian period vocab 1837-1901
probes.question: —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–≤–į –≤–ł–ļ—ā–ĺ—Ä–ł–į–Ĺ—Ü–Ķ–≤ 1837-1901

pass_when.reason: year-range is well-formed ‚ÄĒ must not bounce to smart-clarify

probes.notes: Source PASS: period_vocab –≤—č–Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ ‚ÄĒ —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–≤–į —ć–Ņ–ĺ—Ö–ł —Ā year_from/year_to. FAIL: smart-clarify —Ā –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—Ā—Ć–Ī–ĺ–Ļ —Ā—É–∑–ł—ā—Ć –∑–į–Ņ—Ä–ĺ—Ā.

probes.title: Word-info bundle ‚ÄĒ `ajar` full bundle
probes.question: —á—ā–ĺ –∑–Ĺ–į—á–ł—ā "ajar"
probes.notes: Source PASS: –Ī–į–Ĺ–ī–Ľ ‚ÄĒ –Ņ–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–≤–ĺ–ī + IPA + POS + –ĺ–Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ + 2‚Äď3 corpus-—Ā–Ĺ–ł–Ņ–Ņ–Ķ—ā–į —Ā titles + —ć—ā–ł–ľ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–≥–ł—Ź. FAIL: –Ĺ–Ķ—ā IPA –ł–Ľ–ł corpus-—Ā–Ĺ–ł–Ņ–Ņ–Ķ—ā–ĺ–≤; –≤—č–ī—É–ľ–į–Ĺ–Ĺ—č–Ļ –Ņ—Ä–ł–ľ–Ķ—Ä.

probes.title: Learning pipeline ‚ÄĒ B2 words from Pride and Prejudice
probes.question: 20 —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–≤ —É—Ä–ĺ–≤–Ĺ—Ź B2 –ł–∑ "Pride and Prejudice"

pass_when.reason: learning_words must NOT return 0 ‚ÄĒ the export chain depends on this
answer must contain at least 3 English word tokens (the word list)

probes.notes: Source PASS: ~20 —Ä–Ķ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č—Ö —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–≤ —É—Ä–ĺ–≤–Ĺ—Ź B2, –≥–ĺ–ī–Ĺ—č—Ö –ļ —ć–ļ—Ā–Ņ–ĺ—Ä—ā—É. FAIL: 0 —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–≤ ‚Üí —ć–ļ—Ā–Ņ–ĺ—Ä—ā –Ĺ–Ķ–≤–ĺ–∑–ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ–Ĺ. This is the highest-leverage probe ‚ÄĒ P0 in the source recommendations.

probes.title: Snippet deduplication ‚ÄĒ `heart` examples in Doyle
probes.question: –Ņ—Ä–ł–ľ–Ķ—Ä—č heart —É –Ē–ĺ–Ļ–Ľ–į

pass_when.reason: must contain at least 2 distinct heart-snippets

probes.notes: Source PASS: —Ā–Ĺ–ł–Ņ–Ņ–Ķ—ā—č —Ä–į–∑–Ľ–ł—á–Ĺ—č (dedup_by_key), –Ĺ–Ķ—ā –Ņ–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–ļ—Ä—č—ā–ł–Ļ –Ĺ–į –ĺ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ–ľ –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī–Ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–ł. FAIL: near-duplicate —Ā–Ĺ–ł–Ņ–Ņ–Ķ—ā—č. Deeper dedup check would require parsing the rendered snippets; baseline-diff catches the regression class.

pass_when.reason: role-injection must bounce ‚ÄĒ source acceptance is out_of_scope

pass_when.pattern: (?i)(–Ĺ–į –ļ–į–ļ—É—é —ā–Ķ–ľ—É|–ĺ —á—Ď–ľ –Ņ–ł—Ā–į—ā—Ć|–ļ–į–ļ—É—é —ā–Ķ–ľ—É|—ā–Ķ–ľ—É —ć—Ā—Ā–Ķ|theme of the essay|topic of the essay)
pass_when.reason: engine must NOT accept the role and ask for an essay topic

probes.title: Heavy-query latency ‚ÄĒ what to read after Crime and Punishment
probes.question: —á—ā–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ—á–ł—ā–į—ā—Ć –Ņ–ĺ—Ā–Ľ–Ķ "–ü—Ä–Ķ—Ā—ā—É–Ņ–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—Ź –ł –Ĺ–į–ļ–į–∑–į–Ĺ–ł—Ź"
probes.notes: Source PASS: –∑–į–≤–Ķ—Ä—ą–į–Ķ—ā—Ā—Ź –∑–į < ~60s; routing = book_similar (topic-enriched). FAIL: 150‚Äď330s –Ľ–į—ā–Ķ–Ĺ—ā–Ĺ–ĺ—Ā—ā—Ć. Probe-specific 60s overrides the universal 180s guard.

probes.title: Renderer determinism ‚ÄĒ `B2 –Ī–Ķ–∑ –į—Ä—Ö–į–ł–∑–ľ–ĺ–≤` √ó 3
probes.question: —á—ā–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ—á–ł—ā–į—ā—Ć –Ĺ–į B2 –Ī–Ķ–∑ –į—Ä—Ö–į–ł–∑–ľ–ĺ–≤

pass_when_across_runs.reason: intent must not flip between runs (e.g., export_to_markdown ‚ÜĒ learning)
archaic-disclosure note must consistently appear (or consistently not appear) across 3 runs

probes.notes: Source PASS: archaic-disclosure note –ł intent –ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–į–ļ–ĺ–≤—č –≤–ĺ –≤—Ā–Ķ—Ö 3 –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–≥–ĺ–Ĺ–į—Ö. FAIL: note –Ņ–ĺ—Ź–≤–Ľ—Ź–Ķ—ā—Ā—Ź/–ł—Ā—á–Ķ–∑–į–Ķ—ā; intent –Ņ–Ľ–į–≤–į–Ķ—ā. repeat=3 ‚ÄĒ probe runs the same question three times, across-runs rules check consistency.
